hero.description: No more WhatsApp chaos. Attendance, payments, and receipts in one place — for captains who take the weekly game seriously.
hero.ticker: joined the list in the last 24h

pain1.title: "Who's coming to the game?"
pain1.description: Confirmations lost in WhatsApp. You never know who shows up.

pain2.title: "Has everyone paid yet?"
pain2.description: Chasing players for transfers week after week.

pain3.title: "Where's the proof?"
pain3.description: Images buried in the group. Impossible to validate without wasting time.

items.title: “Who is coming?”
items.description: Confirmations get buried in WhatsApp scroll. You never know who shows up until they do.
items.resolution: Real-time attendance with reserves and a waitlist.

items.title: “Has everyone paid?”
items.description: Chasing players for payment every single week gets old fast.
items.resolution: Payment tracking per player. Paid, pending, and overdue without stress.

items.title: “Where is the receipt?”
items.description: Images disappear in the group chat. Validation becomes a Saturday morning chore.
items.resolution: Upload and quick pre-validation. You approve with a tap.

communityReviews.title: The community speaks
communityReviews.subtitle: Real experiences from people replacing group chat chaos with weekly games that are easier to manage.

sarah.name: Sarah Fuller
sarah.text: I can finally see who confirmed, who is waiting, and who still has not paid without digging through old group messages.

bruno.name: Bruno Roberts
bruno.text: Simple to understand and fast to use. If you organize games every week, it saves time from the first call-up.

mina.name: Mina Adel
mina.text: I like having attendance, payments, and proof uploads in one place. The team understands what is missing before match day.

subbo.name: subbo21
subbo.text: It helps a lot when there are many players and reserves. I no longer need to be the annoying person asking everything in WhatsApp.

coach.name: João Silva
coach.text: Best platform to manage my team!

player.name: Pedro Santos
player.text: More time to focus on the game!

steps.title: Play relaxed
steps.description: See who confirmed, who paid, and what is missing. Whistle on the pitch, not in spreadsheets.

mvp.title: Everything you need.
mvp.body: No bloated modules. No learning curve. Just what weekly captains need to organize games.

journey.title: From opening to final whistle.
journey.body: A short flow to open a team, schedule the game, call up the squad, and close payments inside the app.

steps.label: STEP 01
steps.title: Choose a role
steps.description: Captain or athlete, each person starts on the right path.

steps.label: STEP 02
steps.title: Create the event
steps.description: Date, place, price, and spots are clear from the start.

steps.label: STEP 03
steps.title: Call up the squad
steps.description: Confirmations and waitlist update in real time.

steps.label: STEP 04
steps.title: Close payments
steps.description: Receipt sent, captain notified, accounts settled.

items.name: Sara F.
items.text: I finally know who confirmed and who is late without digging through old messages. I got my Saturday mornings back.

items.name: Bruno R.
items.text: Simple, fast, and it does what it promises. For weekly organizers, it saves hours from the first call-up.

items.name: Mina A.
items.text: Attendance, payments, and receipts in one place. The team understands what is missing before game day.

items.name: André S.
items.text: I no longer need to be the annoying person asking everything on WhatsApp. The app does the dirty work.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing and using JogaBola, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Use of the Service
sections.body: JogaBola is a platform for organizing, managing, and participating in sports events. You may confirm attendance with an account or, when available, as an email-verified guest.
items: Spam, offensive content, and false information are prohibited.
You are responsible for the accuracy of the information you provide and for keeping your account secure.

sections.title: 3. Event Registration
sections.body: When registering for an event, you confirm that the information provided is accurate and that you accept the rules set by the organizer. Verified accounts help manage attendance, payments, and participation history for future events.

sections.title: 4. Payments and Fees
sections.body: Some events may require payment. Payment, refund, or cancellation conditions are defined by the event organizer unless expressly stated otherwise.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: JogaBola is not liable for damages, injuries, cancellations, changes, or technical failures outside our control related to events organized through the platform.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. This includes your name, email address, and event participation data.

sections.title: How We Use Information
sections.body: We use the information collected to provide, maintain, protect, and improve our services, as well as to develop new services.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.body: We do not share personal information with companies, organizations, or individuals outside of JogaBola, unless we have your consent or for legal reasons.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: We work hard to protect JogaBola and our users from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction of information we hold.
